who: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed invoice deadlines cause late payments. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of invoice due dates.
problem: missed invoice deadlines leading to late payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for procurement managers
try_it: Let users try weekly email alerts for invoice due dates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Update the community weekly on progress
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
